name: OWNER | Celina Balcerzak
description:
WLW ! ᴅᴇᴍɪ-ʜᴜᴍᴀɴ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

Celina wasn’t one who cared much about all that demi-human fuss, frankly, she found it more annoying at best. Weird, even. She’d never get one.

That was until she found you, laying there all shivering and wounded on the side of the road.

TW: Mentions of slavery and abuse in the world settings

MLM version ;)
creator: ghoulett
